description: Day 14 direct follow-up with validity reference

content.text:
{"draft_subject":"Re: Proposal - 2-week AI Sprint for Thistle & Finch Accountants","draft_body":"Hi Rachel,

Wanted to circle back on the AI sprint proposal. The pricing I quoted is valid until 18 May, so there's still time, but I'd love to get things moving if you're keen.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work? Happy to walk through anything that's still unclear.

Cheers,
Allan"}

expected.draft_subject: Re: Proposal - 2-week AI Sprint for Thistle & Finch Accountants
expected.draft_body:
Hi Rachel,

Wanted to circle back on the AI sprint proposal. The pricing I quoted is valid until 18 May, so there's still time, but I'd love to get things moving if you're keen.

Would a quick 15-minute call this week work? Happy to walk through anything that's still unclear.

Cheers,
Allan
